source_notes: MONDAY RUN 2026-05-25 EVENING UPDATE. Top remaining candidate now that Notts County vs Salford has already finished. Public sources preview Wolfsburg vs Paderborn as the second leg of the Bundesliga promotion/relegation play-off on Monday at 20:30 after a 0-0 first leg. Strategy read: likely best remaining liquidity and likely 2UP coverage, but needs back/lay before trade ranking because Wolfsburg may be a controlled favourite rather than a chaotic 2UP collapse candidate. Human layer required: confirm 2UP, Wolfsburg back/lay, optional Paderborn back/lay if double-sided, liquidity and stake limits. Use 2% commission headline QL.
